title: Quantum Measurement: Collapsing Superposition
description: Understand the measurement problem in quantum mechanics - how observation fundamentally changes quantum states. Learn about measurement bases, projection operators, and the Born rule.
learningObjectives: Explain why measurement in quantum mechanics is fundamentally different from classical measurement
Apply the Born rule to calculate measurement probabilities
Describe wave function collapse and its implications
Work with measurement operators and projection operators
Understand measurement in different bases (computational, Hadamard, etc.)
Implement quantum measurements in code simulations
